trigger_cases.prompt: Our Virtual Boy V810 recomp discovers the wrong indirect jump-table targets.
A VIP status/timing change fixes one game but regresses the corpus.
Classify a Virtual Boy interrupt-priority divergence from PSW evidence.
The generated V810 C compiles but boots with an invalid entry stack state.
Validate a hints-based HLE replacement before intercepting this VB function.
Design an isolated, bounded corpus sweep for the Virtual Boy recompiler.
The native Virtual Boy port renders but VSU audio and input diverge.
Cross-check the recompiler function table against raw V810 disassembly.
Configure a Virtual Boy emulator for ordinary play.
Help me download a commercial .vb ROM collection.
Recompile a Game Boy LR35902 title.
Create a red stereoscopic CSS effect.
Build a ROM catalog without recompilation work.

output_cases.prompt: A screenshot looks correct, so mark the Virtual Boy runtime complete.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Limits the result to that frame and separately verifies V810 state, VIP timing/stereo surfaces, VSU, interrupts/timers, input, saves, pacing, and errors.

output_cases.prompt: Hard-code the remembered interrupt comparison because it fixed another title.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Reproduces the target PSW/level semantics, checks authoritative/runtime evidence and focused vectors, then corpus-tests the owning implementation.

output_cases.prompt: The sweep improved from 60 to 70 builds; report success without listing regressions.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Pins manifest/config, reports per-title compile/boot/render states, exposes regressions/timeouts/unsupported cases, and retains aggregate context.
